🎉 Create a Board

Encourage Every Employee to Get Involved

Recognition programs only succeed when people actively participate. WorkKudo removes every barrier so contributing feels as natural as sending a message.

Get More People Involved See How It Works
📩 Easy Contributions🌍 Remote-Friendly⚡ No Friction
WorkKudo · Enhance Participation
A

"Added my message in 30 seconds from my phone — zero friction 📱"

Alex R. · Remote
M

"No account needed, just clicked the link and signed the board 💛"

Maya S. · Hybrid
J

⚡ The Challenge

Low Participation Is the Most Common Reason Recognition Programs Fail

Even the best-designed recognition program delivers little value if only a fraction of employees participate. Busy schedules, platform friction, and lack of reminders keep contribution rates low.

WorkKudo is designed from the ground up to maximize participation — making it effortless for every employee to contribute, regardless of their role, location, or schedule.

01Contribution platforms that require sign-up see dramatically lower participation
02Distributed and remote teams miss opportunities due to timezone and tool gaps
03Without reminders, contributors simply forget until it's too late
04Complex contribution processes deter busy employees from getting involved
✨ Key Milestones Board
🎂Birthday

Happy Birthday, Sarah!

"Wishing you the happiest of birthdays! Thank you for bringing so much energy and passion to the product team every single day."

M
Marcus VanceDirector of Product
🏆Milestone

Happy 5-Year Work Anniversary!

"Five years of absolute dedication, building code bases, and leading our team to success. We are incredibly lucky to have you, David."

E
Elena RostovaVP of Engineering
🎖Promotion

Congrats on the Promotion!

"So well-deserved, Clara! Your leadership during the Q1 launch was outstanding. Excited to see you excel in your new Senior Manager role!"

J
James PatelHead of Operations
✦ How WorkKudo Helps

Every Feature Built to Drive Higher Participation

WorkKudo removes every obstacle between an employee and their contribution.

🔗
01

Zero-Account Contribution

Anyone with the link can add a message, photo, or GIF without creating an account. No onboarding, no friction.

📱
02

Mobile-First Experience

Fully optimized for phones and tablets — employees can contribute from anywhere in under a minute.

🔔
03

Automated Reminders

Scheduled reminders notify contributors when boards are open and again as deadlines approach.

💬
04

Notion Integration

Board invitations and contribution links can be shared directly inside your Notion workspace.

📅
05

Flexible Timing

Contributors can participate at any time — async-first design accommodates every timezone and schedule.

🌍
06

Global Accessibility

Every WorkKudo experience works across geographies, languages, and devices without technical barriers.

→ Process

How It Works

✨
1

Create the Board

Launch a recognition board or celebration in minutes and set a delivery date.

📩
2

Invite Contributors

Share a link via email, Notion, or direct URL — no account required to participate.

💬
3

Everyone Contributes

Team members add messages at their own pace. Automated reminders keep participation high.

🎉
4

Deliver Together

The completed experience is delivered with contributions from the whole team.

◉ Use Cases

Enhance Participation In Action

Real scenarios where WorkKudo delivers meaningful results

🎂

Recognition Campaigns

Drive high participation in structured appreciation drives across teams and departments.

📋

Celebration Boards

Ensure maximum contribution on birthday, farewell, and milestone boards before delivery.

🌍

Employee Appreciation Events

Engage every employee across locations in company-wide appreciation initiatives.

Culture Initiatives

Build participation habits through regular, low-friction recognition touchpoints.

🤝

Onboarding Welcome Boards

Help new hires feel immediately welcomed with a board signed by the whole team on day one.

📣

Team Shout-outs

Enable spontaneous peer-to-peer recognition that anyone can initiate and everyone can join.

★ Why It Matters

Real Results for Real Teams

The measurable impact of building a culture of appreciation

📈

Increased Engagement

Frictionless contribution drives dramatically higher participation rates across programs.

💛

Higher Contribution Rates

More team members contribute when participation is simple, accessible, and well-timed.

🌍

More Inclusive Participation

Remote, hybrid, and distributed employees participate equally with no geographic barriers.

😊

Better Employee Experience

Employees who contribute to recognition feel more connected to their teams and organization.

⚡

Faster Completion

Boards fill up faster when contribution is effortless, ensuring great results every time.

🔗

Greater Culture Reach

Recognition reaches every corner of the organization, not just those nearest the manager.

Make Participation the Easy Part

Remove every barrier between your team and meaningful recognition. More participation means more connection, more culture, and more impact.
